RegLoan Bank — Dealer Vehicle Invoice Document INV-0008 Page 1 of 1 Dealer: CityDrive VIN: VIN33737AL Charges Line Description Qty Unit ($) Amount ($) 1 Kia F-150 base 1 26,504 26,504 2 Destination fee 1 1,164 1,164 3 Options package 1 4,430 4,430 4 Doc fee 1 169 169 5 Tax 1 2,841 2,841 Total: $35,108
